DISCOVERY 610, PRESENT: ALLISON J. WOOD, ESQ. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. NO OPPOSITION HAVING BEEN FILED, RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES SET #2, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES SET #1, AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SET #1 IS GRANTED. PETITIONER DONALD LEE IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE COMPLETE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTION WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $360.00, TO BE PAID WITHIN 14 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
